title: Simple Pickaxe 5x5
description: Simple Pickaxe 5x5 is a lightweight utility mod focused on one goal: faster and more efficient mining.
body:
Simple Pickaxe 5x5 is a lightweight utility mod focused on one goal: faster and more efficient mining. Instead of breaking a single block at a time, this special pickaxe allows players to mine a full 5×5 area in one action, dramatically speeding up excavation and reducing repetitive work. It is designed for players who enjoy large building projects, underground bases, quarry-style mining, or terrain shaping without adding complicated mechanics.

The mod keeps gameplay simple and intuitive. The pickaxe behaves like a normal tool but with expanded mining reach, making it feel like a natural upgrade rather than a completely new system. It does not introduce tech trees, machines, or complex crafting chains — just a straightforward improvement to mining convenience while staying close to the vanilla experience.

Features:

* Mines a 5×5 area with a single block break
* Greatly improves speed for large-scale digging
* Perfect for tunnels, quarries, and base preparation
* Simple design with no complex systems
* Maintains a vanilla-friendly feel

Simple Pickaxe 5x5 is all about saving time, reducing grind, and making big projects smoother and more enjoyable.
